creator: scorpio@drkshdw.org
text:
kmp3 cannot fetch distfiles

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=    mb@imp.ch--e8hWoAf1UJkkXJGNQ12OYz5SCiYSxLh3qEZslW9bDaFHus1l
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.old        Mon May 21 19:16:06 2001
+++ Makefile    Mon May 21 19:16:26 2001
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 PORTNAME=      kmp3
 PORTVERSION=   1.0
 CATEGORIES=    audio kde
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.kmp3.org/tarballs/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://area51.mfh-iserlohn.de/kmp3/tarballs/
